name: Omega
author: Néstor Romeral Andrés (2010) / AGP port
description: Néstor Romeral Andrés' 2010 scoring game on a hexagonal grid (NOT Omega Chess). Each turn you place one stone of EVERY colour in play — one of yours, then one of your opponent's — on free cells. The game ends when fewer than 4 free cells remain before White's turn. Your score is the PRODUCT of the sizes of your connected groups; highest product wins, and per the rulebook a tie goes to the later player in turn order (Black). Board side 5–10 selectable; sizes beyond 8 produce gigantic scores.
